scope: goal arc saturation: live-code audit plus second-order innovation pack
rubric: product/game with Studio OS process honesty

findings.title: GM Decision modal choices were cosmetic during advance-week
findings.evidence: public/app.js awaited checkAndShowGmDecision() but discarded the choice; server/local advance-week routes had no gmDecisionChoice path.
findings.implementation: Added shared GM decision consequence engine, wired server and client-only runtime advance-week routes, surfaced latestGmDecision in dashboard state, returned structured modal choices, and added endpoint/browser tests.

findings.title: Startup brief rendered pctUsed=1 as 100% used
findings.evidence: docs/STARTUP_BRIEF.md showed 100% used while scripts/context-meter.mjs --json reported pctUsed near 1.
findings.implementation: Changed render-startup-brief live-meter normalization so live pctUsed is treated as 0-100 percentage, while heuristic fallback remains 0-1.

findings.title: Three-column task-board rows made done items look open
findings.evidence: node scripts/ops.mjs innovation-pack --dry-run listed completed Session 8 task rows as open candidates.
findings.implementation: Normalized parseUnifiedItems() across three-column and ranked tables and added regression tests for done/open status extraction.

findings.title: Innovation pack treated intentional guard sentinels as unfinished work
findings.evidence: Dry-run candidates included Client-only runtime fallback, v5 startup-brief guard code, and parser regex lines.
findings.implementation: Filtered marker scan for regex classifier lines and intentional sentinel/fallback guards; dry-run now only reports latest audit follow-through.

rejected: External SPARKED launch evidence remains honestly deferred until on-domain email forwarding and post-push public route/domain checks are verified.
verification: node scripts/ops.mjs innovation-pack --dry-run (1 candidate: latest audit follow-through)
